task_completion.description: Create a main circle on the XY plane with an 80 mm diameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circle centered at the origin with a diameter constraint of 80 (or radius 40) visible on the SolveSpace canvas or property browser.

task_completion.description: Draw a 35 mm construction line angled at 45 degrees from the origin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line (typically dashed/construction style) starting from the origin with a length constraint of 35 and an angle constraint of 45 degrees visible.

task_completion.description: Create a 10 mm diameter mounting hole centered at the end of the construction line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A smaller circle located at the endpoint of the construction line with a diameter constraint of 10 (or radius 5) visible.

task_completion.description: Extrude the sketch to a thickness of 5 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D sketch is converted into a 3D solid, and the property browser shows an extrusion group with a depth/thickness of 5.0.
A save dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/angled_flange.slvs, or the SolveSpace window title bar displaying 'angled_flange.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active use of SolveSpace's drawing tools, constraint menus, and property browser, rather than a terminal window or text editor generating the .slvs file.

integrity.description: Constraints are genuinely applied within the CAD software.
integrity.visual_evidence: SolveSpace constraint labels (e.g., 'd=80', 'L=35') are visible in the standard SolveSpace UI style on the canvas, not typed as text annotations.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard GUI save dialog is visible, or the application title bar updates to the new filename, rather than terminal commands moving or creating the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/angled_flange.slvs. The model must have an outer diameter of 80.0 (or radius 40.0), a hole diameter of 10.0 (or radius 5.0), a construction line length of 35.0, a construction angle of 45.0 (or equivalent like 135, 225), and an extrusion depth of 5.0.
